AMENDED MOTION To Stay
Off Calendar Feb-28-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert J. Bezemek, Esq. 510/763-5690 for petitioner & moving party Bay Area Air Quality Management District Employees' Association; Steven M. Berliner, Esq. 310/981-2002 & Donna M. Williamson, Esq. 673-7114 for respondents & opposing parties Bay Area Air Quality Management District and Ellen Garvey; Robert G. Thompson, Esq. 916/327-8381 for Public Employment Relations Board.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to stay action denied - once jurisdiction properly invoked change in procedural law does not divert the Court from jurisdiction see Dillon vs. Superior Court 98 Cal.App. 2nd 437.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Respondent to prepare order.
